hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMETERS" | grep -qE "(\.env|\.env\..*|package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|.*\.lock)"; then echo "[BLOCKED] Sensitive file detected. Modifications to .env files and lock files should be done manually."; exit 1; fi'
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm typecheck || echo '[WARNING] Type errors detected. Review before committing.'
